name: Steamworks
description: Valves free developer SDK and publishing platform for distributing games on Steam. Provides matchmaking, DRM, achievements, leaderboards, workshop, and over 90M active players.

seo.title: Steamworks — Game Development Tools
seo.meta_description: Steamworks: Valves free developer SDK and publishing platform for distributing games on Steam. Provides matchmaking, DRM, achievements, leaderboards, workshop,

when_to_use: Steam achievements and leaderboards integrated via Steamworks SDK
Workshop mod support added for community content creation
DRM and license verification implemented via Steamworks API
Steam matchmaking and lobby system built for online game
Steam Deck compatibility badge earned by passing verification suite

pros: Largest PC gaming audience on the planet
Free SDK covers matchmaking, achievements, workshop, P2P
Remote Play and Family Sharing boost reach naturally
Steam Input normalizes controllers across hardware
cons: 30% revenue cut is the industry-standard sore point
Discoverability requires algorithmic luck or marketing spend
Reviews system can tank a launch in hours
Submission and approval process increasingly strict
review.verdict: For PC releases, Steam is non-negotiable despite the 30% cut — nothing else has the audience or features.
review.best_for: Any PC game release that wants meaningful commercial reach and community features
review.not_for: Console or mobile-exclusive titles and devs allergic to the 30% revenue share

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down
